chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. B.A.No.163 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on MA No.16622/24 2. For order on MA No.4900/24 05.12.2024 Mr. Majid Ali Advocate for applicants a/w applicants. Mr. Saleem Akhtar, Addl.P.G. ---- 1. Urgency granted. 2. In this appeal, appellant was granted bail by this Court on 03.05.2011, whereafter, he jumped off the bail and absconded, hence after notice, surety amount of Rs.100,000/- was forfeited vide order dated 29.07.2019. However, thereafter on 06.02.2023 this court while issuing NBWs against the appellant directed NADRA to suspend the CNIC of the absconder as well as his surety. Learned counsel submits that surety amount of the applicant/surety was already forfeited, hence blocked of his CNIC was not warranted. This fact has been conceded by learned Addl.P.G., therefore, the order whereby the CNIC of the applicant/surety was ordered to be blocked on 06.02.2023 to the extent of applicant/surety is re-called. NADRA is directed to un-block the CNIC of the applicant/surety namely Munir Ahmed S/o Eden Khan. The application is accordingly, disposed of. JUDGE Hafiz
